test-duration-help:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration 
  non-stop            Continuous test
  probes              Test duration in number of probes
  time-frame          Test duration in time frame
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)# services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration 
ERROR: Incomplete command.
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
count-help:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration count 
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)# services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration count 
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------^
ERROR: Unknown word: 'count'.
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
time-frame-help:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration time-frame 
  minutes                  Test duration in minutes
  probe-interval           Set the delay time between subsequent transmitted packets in a test
  repeat-interval          Set the delay time between subsequent tests
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)# services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration time-frame 
ERROR: Incomplete command.
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
non-stop-help:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration non-stop 
  computation-interval          Set the periodic metrics computation time for the test
  probe-interval                Set the delay time between subsequent transmitted packets in a test
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)# services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE test-duration non-stop 
ERROR: Incomplete command.
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
profile-options:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE 
  <CR>                          
  apply-groups                  To apply the configuration groups
  apply-groups-exclude          To exclude the configuration groups
  inform-test-results           Enable or disable test failure system event and SNMP trap
  test-duration                 Set the test duration
  thresholds                    Configure CFM two-way delay measurement performance monitoring thresholds
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)# services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement EXPLORE_PROFILE 
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg-profiles-cfm-dm-EXPLORE_PROFILE)#
